procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1053.006
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1053.006 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

key_events.description: Sandbox executed with --network none (cap-drop ALL). Zero outbound connections confirmed by container network policy.

sigma.title: Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via ATSvc
Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via ITaskSchedulerService
Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via SASec
Suspicious Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks

osquery.name: t1053_006_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

osquery.name: t1053_006_at_jobs
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '/var/spool/cron/atjobs/%' OR path LIKE '/var/spool/at/%';

sigma_matches.title: Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via ATSvc
Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via ITaskSchedulerService
Remote Schedule Task Lateral Movement via SASec
Suspicious Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 7 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
